channel.title: amylose content on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in amylose content on funPlantGenes

item.title: Sbe1;sbe1a
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb228530 Gene Symbol: Sbe1 sbe1a spe1 Gene Name: starch branching enzyme1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: SBEIIb;Sbe2b
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb242610 Gene Symbol: SBEIIb Sbe2b Sbe ae1 Gene Name: amylose extender1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmMYB115
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G423833 Gene Symbol: ZmMYB115 Gene Name: GRMZM2G423833 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: The expression of ZmMYB115 can directly regulate the expression of Du1 and Wx and may be positively correlated to the amylose content in maize endosperm.

item.title: ZmSUS1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb392880 Gene Symbol: ZmSUS1 Gene Name: sucrose synthase1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.
